The Main Title

Introduction paragraph setting the stage.

Skipping H2 Entirely

This section jumps from H1 to H3, which is technically invalid but extremely common in real-world HTML.

Back to H2

Now we're at a proper H2.

And Straight to H4

Another skip in heading hierarchy.

Another H2 Section

Two H2s in a Row

The previous two headings were consecutive H2 elements with no content between them.

A Subsection

Content under the subsection.

All the Way to H6

Testing the deepest heading level.

A Second H1?!

Some pages have multiple H1 elements. This is poor HTML but the extractor should handle it gracefully.

The article should still be extractable despite the chaotic heading structure.
